articles.title: MLB trade rumors: Bob Nightengale reveals four SF Giants stars who could soon be traded
articles.description: The San Francisco Giants may be preparing for major roster changes after trading Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians. USA Today insider Bob Nightengale reported that the club would like to move Rafael Devers, Matt Chapman, Willy Adames and Jung Hoo Lee as part of a possible reset. The report has increased speculation around the Giants’ future before the 2026 MLB Draft.

articles.description: The U.S. war on Iran has driven oil prices higher, resulting in more expensive gasoline, diesel and jet fuel, and economists expect to see second-round effects in the months ahead.

articles.title: 'People's will through lawmakers can bring religious reforms': Supreme Court
articles.description: Constitutional courts should be extremely reluctant to alter religious practices, a nine-judge Supreme Court bench cautioned. Only the will of the people, expressed through elected representatives in Parliament and assemblies, can bring about reforms in religious customs. The court emphasized that it's impossible to scrutinize every religious practice.

The victims, identified as Kahnu Dalei, Batua Rout, and Anil Lenka, sustained serious injuries and are in stable condition. Police suspect past enmity as the motive and are reviewing CCTV footage to identify the attackers.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Christopher Paolini: 'The trick is to find happiness in the brief gaps between...' Life lessons on joy, human nature and hardships by American writer
articles.description: Quote of the day by Christopher Paolini highlights a message about finding happiness during short calm moments between life’s challenges. The quote comes from the novel Brisingr, part of The Inheritance Cycle. It reflects resilience, human struggle, and the search for joy despite uncertainty. The message connects with readers across ages because it explains how people can value brief moments of peace while facing ongoing problems in daily life.

articles.title: Vijay’s Astrologer Radhan Pandit Appointed Political Special Duty Officer In Tamil Nadu CM's Office
articles.description:
In a notable appointment by the newly formed Tamil Nadu government, Rickey Radhan Pandit Vettrivel, widely known as the personal astrologer and spiritual advisor of Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay, has been appointed as Officer on Special Duty (Political) in the Chief Minister’s Office. The appointment order was issued by Reeta Harish Thakkar, Principal Secretary to Government, confirming that the appointment would take effect from the date he assumes charge.

Appointment Order Issued By Tamil Nadu Government

In the official communication, Reeta Harish Thakkar stated, “Rickey Radhan Pandit Vettrivel, is appointed as Officer on Special Duty (OSD) to Chief Minister (Political) with effect from the date of joining. The terms and conditions in this regard will be issued separately.”

The appointment has generated significant political attention because of Radhan Pandit’s longstanding association with influential leaders in Tamil Nadu politics, particularly former Chief Minister J. Jayalalithaa and current Chief Minister Vijay.

The move also underlines the growing influence of trusted personal advisors within political establishments, especially figures associated with spirituality and astrology.

ALSO READ: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay Orders Closure Of 717 TASMAC Liquor Shops Near Temples, Schools And Bus Stands

Spiritual Advisor Known For Links With Jayalalithaa

Radhan Pandit is regarded as a prominent spiritual mentor in Tamil Nadu and is said to have maintained close ties with several political leaders over the decades.

People associated with Tamil Nadu politics and individuals close to former Chief Minister Jayalalithaa have often claimed that she consulted Radhan Pandit before taking important political decisions during her tenure.

His association with Vijay has also become increasingly visible in recent years. Ahead of the Assembly elections, Radhan Pandit had reportedly predicted that Vijay’s Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) would emerge victorious in the polls.

Following the party’s win, he was seen visiting Vijay’s residence to personally congratulate the actor-turned-politician after the election results.

ALSO READ: AIADMK Rebel MLAs Back Vijay-Led TVK Govt, Reject ‘DMK Tie-Up’ Plan Linked To EPS

Four Decades In Astrology, Spiritual Guidance

Radhan Pandit has reportedly been practising astrology for nearly 40 years and has built a considerable following through spiritual counselling and astrological consultations.

Apart from advising political figures, he is also active on social media platforms where he shares astrological guidance and spiritual insights with followers.

His elevation to a formal role in the Chief Minister’s Office is being viewed as an unusual but politically significant appointment, particularly because the designation involves political coordination and advisory responsibilities within the government.

articles.title: Bangladeshi national gets three-year imprisonment for forged Indian passport by UP court
articles.description: A Bangladeshi individual, Abdul Amin, has received a three-year jail term from a Ballia court for his involvement in a serious forgery case. By using fake Indian documents, he managed to acquire a phony passport and illegally claim land in West Bengal. With roots in a Rohingya camp, Amin has been known to travel internationally with these forged credentials.

articles.title: Rajasthan Lab Assistant answer key 2026 expected to be released soon at rssb.rajasthan.gov.in: Direct link to download here
articles.description: The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board is expected to release the Rajasthan Lab Assistant Answer Key 2026 soon after conducting the recruitment exam on May 9 and 10. Around seven lakh candidates appeared for the examination held for 804 vacancies. The answer key, response sheets, and question papers will help aspirants estimate their scores before the final results are announced.
